problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: If Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
